span.p:
重试或返回可解释错误
(多副本本地数据继续服务)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Compute Node 崩溃
(无持久状态可丢失)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
路由层一致性哈希重映射
新节点秒级拉起

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
连 Write Node / S3 按需加载工作集
(无需源节点拷贝)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
冷缓存期 cache miss
→ 读穿透对象存储(数十 ms 量级)→ 尾延迟抖动

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
对象存储写入超时
_object_storage_io_timeout(默认 20s)

span.p: 重试 / 降级

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 恢复正常上传

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
本地写缓存堆积 → 背压前台写
OB 本地云盘第一保障兜底

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: RW/RO 或共享日志服务异常

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: RW 切换或 RO 重建本地 hot state

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PALF 重选主 + LogReconfirm(详见第 3 章)
多副本维持日志持久性 RPO=0

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
从对象存储 + log replay 重建热数据
单副本数据层 RTO 分钟级
